description: Likely preserves most of the input and edits a small set of cells based on local object or marker cues. Colors are preserved as a set, though positions may change. Primary structural cue: sparse change. Inferred transformation family: local edit. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_40853293(I):
    x1 = partition(I)
    x2 = fork(recolor, color, backdrop)
    x3 = apply(x2, x1)
    x4 = mfilter(x3, hline)
    x5 = mfilter(x3, vline)
    x6 = paint(I, x4)
    O = paint(x6, x5)
    return O
